name: io.github.runcycles/cycles-mcp-server
title: Cycles — Budget Authority for AI Agents
description: Runtime budget authority for AI agents — reserve, enforce, reconcile spend across providers

environmentVariables.name: CYCLES_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Cycles API key for authentication. Set CYCLES_MOCK=true for local development without a key.

environmentVariables.name: CYCLES_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the Cycles server (e.g. https://api.runcycles.io). Required unless CYCLES_MOCK=true.

environmentVariables.name: CYCLES_MOCK
environmentVariables.description: Enable mock mode for local development — no API key or live server required.

environmentVariables.name: CYCLES_DEFAULT_TENANT
environmentVariables.description: Optional default tenant merged into any tool call that omits it (explicit fields win).

environmentVariables.name: CYCLES_DEFAULT_WORKSPACE
environmentVariables.description: Optional default workspace merged into any tool call that omits it (explicit fields win).

environmentVariables.name: CYCLES_DEFAULT_APP
environmentVariables.description: Optional default app merged into any tool call that omits it (explicit fields win).

environmentVariables.name: CYCLES_DEFAULT_WORKFLOW
environmentVariables.description: Optional default workflow merged into any tool call that omits it (explicit fields win).

environmentVariables.name: CYCLES_DEFAULT_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Optional default agent merged into any tool call that omits it (explicit fields win).

environmentVariables.name: CYCLES_DEFAULT_TOOLSET
environmentVariables.description: Optional default toolset merged into any tool call that omits it (explicit fields win).
